A09FF4D04B90082B0D12DF976AA837FC, Outside Joivillage Is Dangerous

Main Story

A09FF4D04B90082B0D12DF976AA837FC”, “Outside Joivillage Is Dangerous

퀘스트 배경

D3DE2710442ECF5D67BC4BB37A48D99C”, “Kelly says to talk to her if you’re interested in starting combat training.

진행 상황

8E9BEA6E4C51E298E45CC095809FA107”, “Joivillage is safe, but the wild beyond isn’t. 7F6993544595B5CFE491359DAE53D00B”, “Hunt 5 rabbits using a sword. 2699A0724B4592DE9FCCC7BA4B51BC67”, “They’re easy to find, but run away quickly after being hit.

완료

FFB6650B43E1FB37E9899AB3355936E3”, “You hunted 5 rabbits.
